Segment_Description: Senior C-Suite executives at large North American financial services firms with active AI programs.
Include_Industries: Banking, Insurance, Wealth Management, Fintech, Financial Services
Include_Sub_Industries: Retail Banking, Commercial Banking, P&C Insurance, Life Insurance, Asset Management, Digital Banking
Include_Job_Titles: Chief Risk Officer, Chief Compliance Officer, Chief Information Officer, Chief Technology Officer, Chief Digital Officer
Required_Signals_ANY: Open_Opportunity = TRUE OR Engagement_Score >= 60 OR Existing_Customer = TRUE
Exclusion_Industries: Community Banking, Private Equity, Hedge Fund
Exclusion_Criteria: Data_Quality_Status = 'Poor' AND Open_Opportunity != TRUE OR Employee_Count < 500 OR Annual_Revenue < 200000000
Recommended_Channel: Direct Outbound, Paid LinkedIn, Executive Events
Recommended_Campaign: AgentOps — NA — Demand Gen — CxO Outbound
Salesforce_Filter_Logic: Industry IN ('Banking','Insurance','Wealth Management','Fintech','Financial Services') AND Region = 'North America' AND Seniority = 'C-Suite' AND Employee_Count >= 1000 AND Annual_Revenue >= 1000000000 AND Account_Tier IN ('Tier 1','Tier 2') AND Data_Quality_Status != 'Poor'

Segment_Name: UK / Europe — EU AI Act Urgency
Segment_Description: Financial services CxOs in UK and Western Europe facing EU AI Act compliance deadline (August 2026).
Include_Industries: Banking, Insurance, Financial Services, Wealth Management
Include_Sub_Industries: Retail Banking, Commercial Banking, Life Insurance, P&C Insurance, Private Banking, Asset Management
Include_Job_Titles: Chief Risk Officer, Chief Compliance Officer, Chief Information Officer, Chief Compliance & Risk Officer
Include_Countries: UK, Germany, France, Sweden, Ireland, Netherlands, Switzerland, Norway, Denmark, Belgium, Austria
Required_Signals_ANY: Open_Opportunity = TRUE OR Engagement_Score >= 55 OR Regulatory_Trigger CONTAINS 'EU AI Act'
Exclusion_Regions: Africa, LATAM, APAC, North America, Eastern Europe
Exclusion_Criteria: Data_Quality_Status = 'Poor' AND Open_Opportunity != TRUE OR Employee_Count < 1000
Recommended_Campaign: AgentOps — UK/Europe — EU AI Act Urgency
Salesforce_Filter_Logic: Industry IN ('Banking','Insurance','Financial Services','Wealth Management') AND Region IN ('United Kingdom','Western Europe') AND Seniority = 'C-Suite' AND Employee_Count >= 2000 AND Annual_Revenue >= 1000000000 AND Data_Quality_Status != 'Poor'

Segment_Description: Financial services CxOs in Singapore Japan South Korea Australia and Hong Kong aligned to MAS FSC FSA and HKMA AI governance requirements.

Include_Countries: Singapore, Japan, South Korea, Australia, Hong Kong
Exclusion_Regions: Africa, LATAM, Eastern Europe, North America, Western Europe, China (restricted)
Exclusion_Criteria: Data_Quality_Status = 'Poor' OR Country IN ('China') OR Employee_Count < 500

Segment_Description: All contacts with an active open opportunity in Salesforce regardless of other criteria.
Exclusion_Criteria: Data_Quality_Status = 'Poor' OR Notes CONTAINS 'DO NOT CONTACT' OR Notes CONTAINS 'Sanctioned'
Salesforce_Filter_Logic: Open_Opportunity = TRUE AND Data_Quality_Status != 'Poor' AND Notes NOT CONTAINS 'DO NOT CONTACT'

Segment_Description: Existing customers with potential to expand to new business units or upgrade to Enterprise license.
Exclusion_Criteria: Notes CONTAINS 'DO NOT CONTACT' OR Notes CONTAINS 'Sanctioned'
Recommended_Channel: Customer Success, AE Outreach, Executive Events
Salesforce_Filter_Logic: Existing_Customer = TRUE AND Notes NOT CONTAINS 'DO NOT CONTACT'

Segment_Description: VP and Director-level AI Engineering and Technology leaders at target accounts who influence the buying decision.
Include_Industries: Banking, Insurance, Wealth Management, Fintech, Financial Services
Include_Personas: VP AI, VP Engineering, Head of Digital, Head of CX
Include_Job_Titles: VP of AI Strategy, VP Engineering, VP Technology, Head of Digital Transformation, Head of Customer Experience, Director of AI, Director of Technology
Include_Regions: North America, United Kingdom, Western Europe, APAC
Required_Signals_ANY: Account has C-Suite contact in target list OR Open_Opportunity = TRUE
Exclusion_Industries: Community Banking, Private Equity, Hedge Fund
Exclusion_Criteria: Data_Quality_Status = 'Poor' AND Open_Opportunity != TRUE OR Seniority NOT IN ('VP','Director','C-Suite')
Salesforce_Filter_Logic: Industry IN ('Banking','Insurance','Wealth Management','Fintech','Financial Services') AND Seniority IN ('VP','Director') AND Department IN ('Technology','Engineering','AI/ML','Digital','Risk') AND Employee_Count >= 500 AND Annual_Revenue >= 200000000 AND Data_Quality_Status != 'Poor'
